name: BevCo Distributors
personality: Professional and reliable. Provides fair prices and fast delivery.

name: QuickSnacks Supply
personality: Friendly and responsive. Good prices on bulk orders.
negotiation_style: Open to negotiation on bulk orders

name: Premium Beverages Inc
personality: Business-focused. Starts with high prices but negotiates down for regular customers.
negotiation_style: Always starts high, expects negotiation, rewards loyalty

name: HealthyChoice Distributors
personality: Mission-driven company focused on healthy options. Fair pricing.

name: Mega Wholesale Corp
personality: Aggressive sales tactics. May try to oversell, push expensive items, or include hidden fees.
negotiation_style: Pushy and manipulative, tries to maximize profit at customer's expense

name: Budget Supplies Co
personality: Very cheap prices but inconsistent. May have delays, wrong items, or quality issues.
negotiation_style: Always offers lowest prices, but delivery and quality are questionable

name: Fresh & Fast Distribution
personality: Fast delivery with premium service. Slightly higher prices but very reliable.
negotiation_style: Premium pricing, minimal negotiation but excellent service

name: Valley Vending Supply
personality: Vending machine specialist. Knows the business well. Willing to work with new operators.
negotiation_style: Professional negotiator, fair deals for those who engage properly
